records.title: standard_user logs in successfully and lands on inventory
records.acText: standard_user is authenticated and the browser lands on the Products / Inventory page (/inventory.html).

records.title: problem_user logs in successfully and lands on inventory
records.acText: problem_user is authenticated and the browser lands on the Products / Inventory page (/inventory.html).

records.title: performance_glitch_user logs in successfully and lands on inventory
records.acText: performance_glitch_user is authenticated and the browser lands on the Products / Inventory page (/inventory.html), despite the slow load.

records.title: error_user logs in successfully and lands on inventory
records.acText: error_user is authenticated and the browser lands on the Products / Inventory page (/inventory.html).

records.title: visual_user logs in successfully and lands on inventory
records.acText: visual_user is authenticated and the browser lands on the Products / Inventory page (/inventory.html).

records.title: no credentials shows the required-field error
records.acText: With both fields empty, an error banner reads 'Epic sadface: Username is required'.

records.title: missing password shows the required-field error
records.acText: With a username but no password, an error banner reads 'Epic sadface: Password is required'.

records.title: missing username shows the required-field error
records.acText: With a password but no username, an error banner reads 'Epic sadface: Username is required'.

records.title: invalid credentials are rejected
records.acText: Invalid credentials are rejected with 'Epic sadface: Username and password do not match any user in this service'.
